title: Bizlink to Buy Blackstone’s Interplex Unit in $850 Million Deal
title_cn: Bizlink 将斥资 8.5 亿美元收购 Blackstone 的 Interplex 部门
summary: Bizlink Holding Inc. has agreed to buy the information and communications technology unit of Blackstone Inc.’s Interplex in a deal valued at about $850 million.

title: France’s Proparco Plans Sri Lanka Investments After Default
title_cn: 法国 Proparco 计划在违约后对斯里兰卡进行投资
summary: Proparco, the private-sector financing arm of Agence Française de Développement, plans to fund Sri Lankan companies involved in renewable energy, agribusiness and women-led small enterprises, according to Vincent Vandenbussche, acting regional director for South Asia.

title: Cannabis Medicine for Back Pain Aims to Displace Opioids
title_cn: 治疗背痛的大麻药物旨在取代阿片类药物
summary: A cannabis-derived drug for lower back pain will soon go on sale in Germany and Austria in what its developer views as a dry run for launching in the world’s biggest pharma market: the US.

title_cn: 安巴尼支持的机器人初创公司寻求 1 亿美元以在印度取得领先地位
summary: Indian startup Addverb Technologies Ltd. is seeking to raise more than $100 million, trying to cement its role as the country’s top maker of robots.

title: Ziemba: US Strategic Reserves Lowest in Over 40 Years
title_cn: Ziemba：美国战略储备处于40多年来最低水平
summary: Oil prices rose after fresh US and Iranian strikes in the Gulf. President Donald Trump blamed Tehran for shooting down an American military helicopter off the coast of Oman.  Rachel Ziemba, Founder of Ziemba Insights, spoke to Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa on the oil markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sexton: US Way Behind China in Tech IPO Listings
title_cn: 塞克斯顿：美国在科技股IPO上市方面远远落后于中国
summary: Blockbuster IPOs planned by Anthropic, OpenAI and SpaceX has renewed interest in companies listing this year. This comes despite volatility caused by the ongoing war in the Middle East. Jeffrey Sexton, Demeter Tactical Investments CEO, spoke to Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa on the market reaction. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Africa’s Eskom Spinoff Plan Raises Credit Profile Concerns
title_cn: 南非 Eskom 分拆计划引发信用状况担忧
summary: South Africa’s plan to split power utility Eskom Holdings SOC Ltd. into separate units could weaken the state-owned electricity utility’s risk profile because its transmission unit accounts for a major share of its earnings, according to a bondholder and a ratings agency.

title: Nippon Steel’s First Bond Since US Steel Deal Raises ¥90 Billion
title_cn: 新日铁自美国钢铁交易以来首笔债券筹集 900 亿日元
summary: Nippon Steel Corp. raised ¥90 billion ($560 million) via its first straight-bond offering since completing the acquisition of United States Steel Corp.

title: Stocks Decline Before CPI, Gold Drops on Fed Bets: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 股市先于消费者物价指数下跌，黄金因美联储押注而下跌：市场总结
summary: Stocks resumed their slide as technology shares remained under pressure and investors trimmed positions ahead of a key inflation reading in the US. Gold dropped.

title: Oil Trims Gains as Traders Weigh Fallout From US Strikes on Iran
title_cn: 交易员权衡美国打击伊朗的影响，油价下跌
summary: Oil erased gains as traders weighed the outlook for peace talks over the Iran war after a brief US military campaign against the Islamic Republic following the downing of an American helicopter.

title: Steady UK Assets Dodge Global Volatility
title_cn: 稳定的英国资产规避全球波动

title: Yes Bank Hikes FX Deposit Rates to Attract Non-Resident Inflows
title_cn: Yes银行提高外汇存款利率以吸引非居民资金流入
summary: Yes Bank Ltd. has raised interest rates on foreign currency non-resident deposits by as much as 335 basis points, becoming one of the first Indian lenders to offer the program aimed at attracting capital flows and shore up the battered rupee.

title: HKEx CEO Talks SpaceX IPO and China's Capital Crackdown
title_cn: 香港交易所首席执行官谈 SpaceX IPO 和中国的资本打击
summary: Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing CEO Bonnie Chan highlights how SpaceX's IPO underscores the global companies behind its supply chains, and discussed Beijing's curbs on illegal cross-border investments. She spoke at Bloomberg Invest Hong Kong 2026. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: El Niño Emerges in Pacific, Raising Heat and Crop Risks
title_cn: 太平洋出现厄尔尼诺现象，加剧高温和农作物风险
summary: El Niño has formed across the equatorial Pacific, setting the stage for months of droughts, floods and temperature fluctuations that will threaten communities worldwide along with agriculture and energy.

title: Gold Slumps Below $4,200 as Renewed US-Iran Clashes Test Truce
title_cn: 美伊冲突升级测试休战，金价跌破 4,200 美元
summary: Gold extended a decline after the US launched strikes against Iran in retaliation for the downing of a military helicopter, jeopardizing efforts to end the war that’s roiled global markets and raised inflation risks.

title: Malaysia Palm Reserves Jump Most in Five Months as Exports Slump
title_cn: 由于出口下滑，马来西亚棕榈储量五个月来涨幅最大
summary: Palm oil stockpiles in Malaysia climbed at the fastest pace in five months as a sharp drop in exports overshadowed weaker production in the world’s second-largest grower.

title: ChinaAMC on Chinese Investors’ Investment Demand
title_cn: 华夏基金谈中国投资者的投资需求
summary: Yimei Li, CEO of ChinaAMC, says she has seen mainland depositors gradually moving money into investments and that retail investors are becoming more involved with ETFs. She speaks with Yvonne Man and Minmin Low from the sidelines of “Bloomberg Invest Hong Kong.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Australia’s Steadfast Group Gets Offer From Amwins, Dragoneer
title_cn: 澳大利亚 Steadfast 集团收到 Amwins 和 Dragoneer 的报价
summary: Australian insurance broker Steadfast Group Ltd. received a buyout offer from Amwins Group Inc. and Dragoneer Investment Group LLC.

title: China Taps Commercial Oil Stockpiles to Help Weather Gulf Shock
title_cn: 中国利用商业石油库存来帮助应对海湾冲击
summary: China has started tapping its commercial crude reserves to help offset the supply shock from the Iran war, although the world’s biggest oil importer is continuing to prioritize lower refinery use and fuel export limits to manage the fallout.

title: E Fund’s Li: Market Sentiment ‘Cautiously Optimistic’
title_cn: 易方达基金李：市场情绪“谨慎乐观”
summary: Jeff Li, Global Equity CIO at E Fund HK, says he expects technology fundamentals to drive equity markets as the macro environment becomes “relatively tighter.” He speaks with David Ingles from the sidelines of “Bloomberg Invest Hong Kong.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Korea Stock Hedging Surges to Level That Warned of Past Selloffs
title_cn: 韩国股市对冲飙升至对过去抛售发出警告的水平
summary: The number of bearish options tied to South Korea’s Kospi 200 Index has climbed so sharply relative to bullish wagers that it is nearing a level that previously foreshadowed market declines.

title: Markets Weigh AI Rotation, US 'Self-Defense' Strikes | The Asia Trade 6/10/2026
title_cn: 市场权衡人工智能轮换，美国“自卫”袭击亚洲贸易 6/10/2026
summary:
"Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sri Lankan Rupee Surges 2% on Central Bank Measure to Support FX
title_cn: 斯里兰卡央行采取措施支持外汇，斯里兰卡卢比飙升 2%
summary: The Sri Lankan rupee surged more than 2% after the central bank cut the period for converting export proceeds into the local currency.

title: US Says Completed Iran Strikes After Helicopter Attack
title_cn: 美国称在直升机袭击后完成对伊朗的打击
summary: The US military carried out precision strikes on Iranian air defense and radar sites, calling it a proportional response to recent attacks on American forces and shipping, Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Korea’s Kospi Extends Losses on Chipmakers, War-Tied Jitters
title_cn: 韩国 Kospi 扩大芯片制造商的损失，引发战争紧张情绪
summary: South Korea’s equity benchmark fell Wednesday, with chip stocks resuming losses and risk appetite weakening following a US strike on Iran.

title: Head-HKEx's Bonnie Chan Says SpaceX Is An Exciting Deal
title_cn: 香港交易所总裁 Bonnie Chan 表示 SpaceX 是一项令人兴奋的交易
summary: HKEx CEO Bonnie Chan about the SpaceX listing says that Chinese supply chains have a very broad coverage. She speaks with Bloomberg TV's David Ingles at Bloomberg Invest 2026 in Hong Kong. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Japan’s 30-Year Bond Sale Draws Weakest Demand Since June 2025
title_cn: 日本 30 年期债券发行需求自 2025 年 6 月以来最弱
summary: Japan’s 30-year government bond auction drew the weakest demand since June 2025 as a decline in yields dented investor appetite, with concerns over inflation and fiscal policy weighing on sentiment.

title: Bouncing’s What Markets Do Best
title_cn: 反弹是市场最擅长的
summary: But rebounds aside, red flags from BofA are warning of underlying danger in US stocks.

title: Einride Joins US-Listed Driverless Trucking Rivals on Nasdaq
title_cn: Einride 加入纳斯达克美国上市无人驾驶卡车竞争对手行列
summary: Swedish driverless truck group Einride AB will make its trading debut in New York on Wednesday with hopes of benefiting from the investor buzz generated by SpaceX’s initial public offering later in the week.

title: Indonesian Market Selloff Eases as Rupiah, Bonds, Stocks Rebound
title_cn: 随着卢比、债券和股票反弹，印尼市场抛售有所缓解
summary: Indonesian assets rebounded after officials stepped up efforts to reassure foreign investors, driving the rupiah to its biggest gain in more than a year while easing pressure on bonds and lifting stocks.

title: Paul Chan on Hong Kong’s Market Outlook
title_cn: 陈保罗谈香港市场前景
summary: Paul Chan, Financial Secretary, Hong Kong Special Administrative Region of the People's Republic of China told Bloomberg’s Yvonne Man that legitimate inflows are still being encouraged when he was asked about Beijing’s recent crackdown on cross border capital flows at Bloomberg Invest 2026 in Hong Kong.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rupiah Risks Remain After Surprise Indonesia Rate Hike
title_cn: 印尼意外加息后卢比风险依然存在
summary: Bank Indonesia’s surprise rate hike rattled markets as the rupiah slid further, underscoring investor unease, Bloomberg's Marcus Wong reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hong Kong Dollar Carry Trade Appeal Dims as Funding Costs Climb
title_cn: 融资成本上升，港元套利交易吸引力减弱
summary: A seasonal cash demand spike in Hong Kong is set to lift funding costs, making it less attractive to pursue a carry trade using the local dollar, analysts said.

title: Tech Selloff an Opportunity: BlackRock's APAC Head
title_cn: 科技股抛售是一个机会：贝莱德亚太区负责人
summary: BlackRock Head of Asia Pacific Susan Chan describes the selloff in tech stocks as an "opportunity", saying markets have proven to be resilient over time. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Leonardo CEO Eyes Green Light for Space Venture in 2027
title_cn: 莱昂纳多首席执行官为 2027 年太空创业开绿灯
summary: Leonardo SpA’s new chief executive officer expects European regulatory approval for its satellite venture with Airbus SE and Thales SA by the end of next year, clearing the way for one of Europe’s most ambitious defense and space projects.

title: ASML’s Surge Masks Lowball Valuation Relative to Peers
title_cn: ASML 的飙升掩盖了相对于同行的低估值
summary: ASML's ascent to fresh record highs has been a highlight for European markets, yet it’s done little to improve what is the semiconductor firm's cheapest relative valuation in years. Its forward price-to-earnings ratio relative to major peers is at the lowest in more than a decade. Bloomberg's Dasha Afanasieva reports from Amsterdam. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Expect Strong Second Half of Year for Private Equity: Carlyle's Steve Wise
title_cn: 凯雷投资的史蒂夫·怀斯预计下半年私募股权将表现强劲
summary: Carlyle's Co-Head of American Private Equity, Steve Wise, says activity is starting to pick up in private markets, with credit markets in good shape and a good backdrop for M&A. In an interview on "The Pulse with Francine Lacqua" on June 9, Wise also discussed the strength of the US economy and why Carlyle is investing in the defense and industrial industries.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google's Backstops Underpin $35 Billion Anthropic Chip Deal
title_cn: 谷歌的支持支撑了 350 亿美元的人类芯片交易
summary: Anthropic is leasing powerful computer chips at five data centers with help from Google, one of the artificial intelligence firm's earliest investors. Google has agreed to backstop lease payments at each location, helping Anthropic obtain what amounts to a $35 billion loan. Bloomberg's Neil Campling explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tata Boss Predicts AI Agents Will Replace Half Its Tech Jobs
title_cn: 塔塔老板预测人工智能代理将取代一半的技术工作
summary: The boss of one of India’s largest conglomerates predicted AI agents will replace half the jobs at IT leader Tata Consultancy Services Ltd. in future, joining a growing list of company chiefs warning about major disruptions as artificial intelligence matures.

title: TSMC’s Monthly Sales Rise 30% Thanks to Sustained AI Chip Demand
title_cn: AI芯片需求持续旺盛，台积电月销售额增长30%
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. reported a 30% rise in its monthly sales, reflecting continued strength in demand spurred by a global rush to build AI infrastructure.

title: Taiwan Eyes Curbs on AI Chip Sales to China to Align With US
title_cn: 台湾希望与美国保持一致，限制对中国大陆的人工智能芯片销售
summary: Taiwan authorities are considering much stricter export controls on AI chip sales to China to further align with US measures, according to people familiar with the matter, an effort to address semiconductor smuggling that risks drawing a rebuke from Beijing.

title: Fmr. Australian Ambo to US on Geopolitics
title_cn: 先生。澳大利亚安博向美国谈地缘政治
summary:
Dennis Richardson, former Australian Ambassador to the US, discusses the future for Australia–US relations at a time of heightened geopolitical tensions and fragile global alliances amid trade strains.
He speaks exclusively with Haidi Stroud Watts at the Morgan Stanley Australia summit in Sydney on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Singapore Court Moves to Seize Capital A’s Assets in Dispute
title_cn: 新加坡法院采取行动扣押 Capital A 的争议资产
summary: A Singapore court has moved to seize stakes in fintech firm Big Pay and logistics unit Teleport held by Capital A Bhd.’s Move Digital Sdn. to enforce an arbitration award stemming from a shareholder dispute.

title: Nintendo Shares Slide After 2026 Game Showcase Disappoints
title_cn: 2026 年游戏展示令人失望后，任天堂股价下滑
summary: Nintendo Co.’s shares fell by the most in a month after the game maker’s presentation of upcoming games came up short on brand-new titles from heavyweight franchises such as Mario.

title: ASML’s Surge to Record High Masks Lowball Valuation Versus Peers
title_cn: ASML 口罩销量飙升创历史新高，估值相对于同行偏低
summary: ASML Holding NV’s ascent to fresh record highs has been a highlight for European markets, yet it’s done little to improve what is the stock’s cheapest relative valuation in years.

title: Stocks Pare Tech-Led Drop as Rotation Gains Speed | The Close 6/9/2026
title_cn: 随着轮动加快，股市收窄科技股主导的跌幅收盘价 6/9/2026
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Amerant Investments Senior Vice President & Chief Investment Officer Baylor Lancaster-Samuel, Mizuho Americas Head of Investment & Corporate Banking Michal Katz, Evercore Co-Head of Us Investment Banking Naveen Nataraj, IBM CEO Arvind Krishna, Uniphore CEO & Co-Founder Umesh Sachdev, Schwab Center for Financial Research’s Kevin Gordon, AlphaSimplex Chief Research Strategist Katy Kaminski, FIS President & CEO Stephanie Ferris, Lumentum Holdings CEO Michael Hurlston, & FIFA World Cup North Texas Organizing Committee Co-Chair Dan Hunt, Bruin Capital Founder & CEO George Pyne. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Super Micro Seeks $7 Billion in Equity Deal for AI Equipment
title_cn: Super Micro 寻求 70 亿美元的 AI 设备股权交易
summary: Super Micro Computer Inc. plans to raise $7 billion through a package of equity offerings to purchase the components needed to fulfill customers’ orders for the company’s artificial intelligence servers.

title: Lumentum CEO: See Huge Opportunity for Optics Industry
title_cn: Lumentum首席执行官：看到光学行业的巨大机遇
summary: Michael Hurlston, CEO of Lumentum, discussed the critical role of indium phosphide in optical chips, particularly lasers, which are essential for the AI revolution. He explained that the increasing speeds and bandwidth requirements in data centers are driving a shift toward optical connectivity using fiber optics, as light offers unmatched transmission speed. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: IBM CEO: AI Won’t Necessarily Lead To Smaller Headcount
title_cn: IBM CEO：人工智能不一定会导致员工人数减少
summary: IBM CEO Arvind Krishna discusses IBM's significant $10 billion investment in quantum computing, a faster form of AI. Krishna also noted a $1 billion federal government commitment to build a chip fabrication facility in Albany, New York, illustrating a strong collaboration between public and private sectors. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FIS President & CEO: We’re All Part of an Integrated Ecosystem
title_cn: FIS 总裁兼首席执行官：我们都是综合生态系统的一部分
summary: FIS President & CEO Stephanie Ferris discusses the database of information that her company can make available to financial institutions to give customers hyper-specific experiences. She discusses the AI technology that her company uses, and the security measures in place to make sure that sensitive data is protected. She speaks with Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Crypto 6/9/2026
title_cn: 彭博加密货币 6/9/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Crypto" covers the people, transactions, and technology shaping the world of decentralized finance. Today's guests: Delta Blockchain Fund Founder and Managing Director Kavita Gupta, DTCC Digital Assets Managing Director & Global Head Nadine Chakar, MoneyGram CEO Anthony Soohoo, and Securitize CEO Carlos Domingo.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mizuho Head of Investment: AI Is Imacting Every Sector in the Global Economy
title_cn: 瑞穗投资主管：人工智能正在影响全球经济的各个领域
summary: Mizuho Americas Head of Investment & Corporate Banking Michal Katz discusses the future of artificial intelligence at the Mizuho Technology Conference. She discusses how the adoption of AI can change the landscape of businesses, but also the economies of countries around the world. She speaks with Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: 'We Have To Prepare' for the AI Transition Says Gina Raimondo
title_cn: 吉娜·雷蒙多表示，“我们必须为人工智能转型做好准备”
summary:
Gina Raimondo, 40th Commerce Secretary joined Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss the AI race, and its labor market impact. She said the US needs to lead the global AI race and that we should prepare all Americans in order to be successful as a nation.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Use in Health Care 'Barely Scratching the Surface' Says Philips' Jeff DiLullo
title_cn: 飞利浦的 Jeff DiLullo 表示，人工智能在医疗保健领域的应用“仅仅触及表面”
summary:
Jeff DiLullo, CEO of Phillips North America, said that while a new report shows AI use by health care clinicians is ramping up, the industry has 'barely scratched the surface' of what new technology can achieve. 
DiLullo said that AI can improve both the quality of work and quality of life of doctors as it narrows down areas of focus and reduces burnout.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FIFA, Kraken Share Permissionless Philosophy: Sethi
title_cn: FIFA、Kraken 分享无需许可的哲学：Sethi
summary: Arjun Sethi, Co-CEO of Kraken, joins Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." They discuss Kraken's potential IPO, layoffs, and their partnership with FIFA for the upcoming World Cup (Source: Bloomberg)

title: IPO Positions us for Acquisitions: Securitize CEO
title_cn: IPO 为我们的收购做好了准备：首席执行官证券化
summary: Carlos Domingo, CEO of Securitize, joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." They discuss why he believes it's a good time for Securitize to go public, including raising the profile of tokenization and raising capital for acquisitions. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FTX Co-Founder Sam Bankman-Fried Applies for Trump Pardon
title_cn: FTX 联合创始人 Sam Bankman-Fried 申请特朗普赦免
summary: Bloomberg's Emily Nicolle joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." FTX co-founder Sam Bankman-Fried formally applied for a presidential pardon, more than two years after he was convicted over the multi-billion dollar collapse of his once-thriving cryptocurrency empire. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitcoin Steadies After $60,000 Breach as Saylor Adds to Hoard
title_cn: Saylor 增加囤积，比特币突破 60,000 美元后稳定
summary: Bloomberg's Emily Nicolle joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Bitcoin steadied itself after dropping below the key threshold of $60,000, as Strategy Chairman Michael Saylor resumed making purchases of the token. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Robots Are Critical to US Manufacturing, Says Standard Bots CEO
title_cn: Standard Bots 首席执行官表示，机器人对美国制造业至关重要
summary: Standard Bots has raised $200 million in a new round of funding to ramp up manufacturing of robotic arms in the US as the country vies to keep pace with China in building more advanced robots. Standard Bots co-founder and CEO, Evan Beard joins Caroline Hyde to discuss on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Rally Fuels Tech Optimism | Open Interest 6/9/2026
title_cn: 人工智能集会助长科技乐观情绪未平仓合约 6/9/2026
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." The AI rebound rolls on as investors stay bullish on tech. OpenAI confidentially files for an IPO, SpaceX readies its blockbuster debut, and Apple faces doubts over its AI push. Plus, some optimism in the housing market as existing home sales accelerate, Emily Graffeo  joins Open Interest on Apollo and Blackstone’s $35 billion AI financing deal, and Firefly Aerospace CEO Jason Kim on the space economy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Police, Protesters Clash in Kenya over US Ebola Facility
title_cn: 肯尼亚警察与抗议者因美国埃博拉设施发生冲突
summary: Kenyan police fired teargas at protesters demonstrating against a planned quarantine facility for US servicemen and citizens exposed to the Ebola virus. Bloomberg's Helen Nyambura reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Xi Cements Sway Over North Korea as Kim Names China Priority
title_cn: 金正恩将中国列为优先事项，习近平巩固了对朝鲜的影响力
summary: Kim Jong Un feted Chinese President Xi Jinping with two days of lavish celebrations in Pyongyang, calling ties with China a “top priority” in a clear message that Beijing, not Moscow, remains North Korea’s most important partner.

title: Philippines Plans Sea Border Talks With Japan Amid China Warning
title_cn: 在中国发出警告之际，菲律宾计划与日本进行海上边界谈判
summary: The Philippines intends to pursue talks on maritime borders with Japan despite opposition from Beijing, according to Manila’s Foreign Affairs Secretary Ma. Theresa Lazaro.

title: Japan and Malaysia Agree on Deeper Maritime Defense Cooperation
title_cn: 日本和马来西亚就深化海上防务合作达成一致
summary: Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi and her Malaysian counterpart Anwar Ibrahim agreed to further cooperation on defense and energy supplies, an alignment based on common concerns over China’s maritime claims and the economic disruptions from the Iran war.

title: Philippines Urges China to Remove Structure in Disputed Shoal
title_cn: 菲律宾敦促中国拆除争议浅滩上的建筑物
summary: The Philippines has asked China to remove a floating structure that it has monitored in a disputed shoal in the South China Sea, as tensions between the two nations flare up anew.

title: Young Koreans Demand Answers on Ballot Shortage as Probe Begins
title_cn: 调查开始后，韩国年轻人要求就选票短缺问题给出答案
summary: Young voters in South Korea are condemning the government’s handling of local elections after dozens of polling stations ran short of ballots, forcing some people to leave without voting and others to cast ballots after counting had begun.

title: Nevada Attorney General Wins Democratic Gubernatorial Primary
title_cn: 内华达州总检察长赢得民主党州长初选
summary: Aaron Ford, Nevada’s attorney general, has prevailed over a crowded field of Democrats to face off against first-term Governor Joe Lombardo, a Republican, in a race that will test voters’ willingness to back President Donald Trump’s economic agenda in the midst of headwinds caused in part by his policies.

title: US Denies North Korea Nuclear Arms ‘Closed Issue’ After Xi Visit
title_cn: 习近平访问后美国否认朝鲜核武器问题“已结束”
summary: The US and Japan said they remain committed to the denuclearization of North Korea despite China’s apparent downgrading of the subject and Russia’s assertion that it was a “closed issue.”

title: Graham Platner Wins Democratic Senate Primary in Maine, DDHQ Projects
title_cn: Graham Platner 在缅因州赢得民主党参议院初选，DDHQ Projects
summary: Progressive Democrat Graham Platner won the party’s Senate primary in Maine after a bruising campaign which became as much about his accusations of past misbehavior as it was voters’ top concerns.

title: Prabowo Needs More Than Rate Hikes to Fix Market, Analysts Say
title_cn: 分析师表示，普拉博沃需要的不仅仅是加息来修复市场
summary: The surprise hike in Indonesia’s interest rates on Tuesday helped the rupiah rebound from a record low, but analysts say it likely won’t restore long-term investor confidence in President Prabowo Subianto’s management of the economy.

title: US Strikes Iran After Helicopter Downed, Testing Peace Talks
title_cn: 美国在直升机被击落后袭击伊朗，测试和谈
summary: US forces carried out strikes against Iran hours after President Donald Trump blamed Tehran for shooting down an American military helicopter off the coast of Oman.

title: US Needs Strategic Victory in Iran, Ex-Australian Envoy Says
title_cn: 前澳大利亚特使表示，美国需要在伊朗取得战略胜利
summary: The US must win its war against Iran strategically, not just militarily, said Dennis Richardson, a former Australian ambassador to Washington, as well as chief of the country’s defense and foreign affairs departments.

title: Graham Platner’s Scandals Risk Spoiling Democrats’ Maine Bet
title_cn: 格雷厄姆·普拉特纳的丑闻可能会破坏民主党在缅因州的赌注
summary: Graham Platner heads into Maine’s Democratic Senate primary on Tuesday facing a fresh bout of controversy, turning what had looked like a coronation into a test of whether he’s a viable candidate for the party’s push to secure a majority in this year’s midterms.

title: Lindsey Graham Wins GOP Senate Primary in South Carolina, DDHQ Projects
title_cn: Lindsey Graham 在南卡罗来纳州赢得共和党参议院初选，DDHQ Projects
summary: Incumbent Lindsey Graham, who was endorsed by President Trump, is projected to win the Republican Senate primary in South Carolina, according to DDHQ.

title: US Launches 'Self-Defense' Strikes Against Iran | Balance of Power: Late Edition 06/09/2026
title_cn: 美国对伊朗发动“自卫”打击权力平衡：最新版 06/09/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Retired Rear Admiral Mark Montgomery, Senior Fellow at the Foundation for Defense of Democracies, says any US response after President Trump said Iran shot down an American Apache helicopter near the Strait of Hormuz should target military sites tied to the attack and avoid economic targets that could escalate the conflict. Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation Chairman Travis Hill says he "fully" disagrees with Federal Reserve Governor Michael Barr's warning that recent regulatory changes could weaken bank safety and soundness, arguing regulators are trying to focus examiners on material financial risks while keeping the banking system balanced and resilient. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cuba Poised for Biggest US Fuel Shipment Since Cold War Embargo
title_cn: 古巴准备接收自冷战禁运以来最大规模的美国燃料运输
summary: A Florida trading company is in advanced talks to send Cuba the biggest cargo of US fuel since the Eisenhower administration as the island nation contends with an acute energy crisis.

title: Hegseth Plans Trip to Guantanamo Bay Amid US-Cuba Tensions
title_cn: 赫格斯计划在美古紧张局势中前往关塔那摩湾
summary: Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth will travel to the US Navy base at Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, on Wednesday as the Trump administration continues to demand drastic reforms by the communist government in Havana.

title: Customs Says $11.4 Billion Is Tied Up in US Tariff Refund Appeal
title_cn: 海关称美国关税退款上诉中涉及 114 亿美元
summary: A judge urged the Trump administration to back off its appeal of his order to fully refund $166 billion in tariffs overturned by the Supreme Court, saying it was unnecessary and would only create more delays for importers to get their money back.

title: South Carolina GOP Primary to Test Trump's Influence
title_cn: 南卡罗来纳州共和党初选将考验特朗普的影响力
summary: Bloomberg’s Anna Edgerton shares her insight on South Carolina’s Primary day as voters cast their ballots in a crowded field for the South Carolina GOP Governor nomination. Anna talks about the different candidates and how the votes may show which parts of President Trump’s agenda and MAGA values appeal most to voters. She speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Thune Urges Trump to Tap Permanent Spy Chief After Pulte
title_cn: 图恩敦促特朗普在普尔特之后任命永久间谍头子
summary: Senate Republican Leader John Thune urged President Donald Trump to nominate a permanent national intelligence director to expedite congressional renewal of US spy agencies’ broad electronic surveillance authority.

title: What to Expect From Maine's Primary Election
title_cn: 对缅因州初选有何期待
summary: Bloomberg’s Brooke Sutherland breaks down what to expect in Maine as voters cast their ballots in today’s Primary election. She discusses whether or not Graham Platner will be the Democratic Senate nominee and how his past controversies may impact his general election bid against current Maine Senator (R) Susan Collins. Brooke speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Venezuela Deploys Troops in Mafia-Run Gold Mining Heartland
title_cn: 委内瑞拉在黑手党经营的金矿中心地带部署军队
summary: Venezuela stepped up its troop presence in its southern gold-mining region as the government moves to reopen the sector to foreign investment.

title: FDIC Chair Hill Rejects Barr's Warning on Bank Rules
title_cn: FDIC 主席希尔拒绝巴尔关于银行规则的警告
summary: Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation Chairman Travis Hill says he "fully" disagrees with Federal Reserve Governor Michael Barr's warning that recent regulatory changes could weaken bank safety and soundness, arguing regulators are trying to focus examiners on material financial risks while keeping the banking system balanced and resilient. He speaks with Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Launches Strikes Against Iran After Helicopter Is Downed
title_cn: 直升机被击落后美国对伊朗发动空袭
summary: Meghan Hughes, a Democratic strategist, and Katie Frost, a Republican strategist, discuss the latest US strikes against Iran after an American military helicopter was shot down off Oman. They speaks on "Balance of Power: Evening Edition." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ret. Rear Adm. Urges Trump to Keep Iran Response ‘Proportionate’
title_cn: 退休。少将敦促特朗普对伊朗的反应保持“相称”
summary: Retired Rear Admiral Mark Montgomery, Senior Fellow at the Foundation for Defense of Democracies and Former Destroyer Squadron Commander in the US Navy, says any US response after President Trump said Iran shot down an American Apache helicopter near the Strait of Hormuz should target military sites tied to the attack and avoid economic targets that could escalate the conflict. His comments were made minutes before CENTCOM announced it had began 'self-defense' strikes against Iran. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sports Belong on Free Channels, Broadcast Group Will Testify
title_cn: 体育属于免费频道，广播集团将作证
summary: Sports games ought to be primarily shown on free, over-the-air TV channels rather than on subscription-based streaming platforms, the head of the National Association of Broadcasters plans to tell members of Congress in a hearing about the rising costs to consumers.

title: H-1B Visa Rules Have Changed Again. What to Know
title_cn: H-1B 签证规则再次发生变化。要知道什么
summary: In addition to ramping up immigration enforcement and deportations in his second term, US President Donald Trump has taken steps to overhaul the H-1B visa program. Trump argues that the H-1B, a cornerstone of the employment-based immigration system that allows US companies to hire college-educated foreigners for specialized occupations, has been exploited to displace American workers.

title: Mexico’s Gripe With US Trade Pact: South Korea Has Better Deal
title_cn: 墨西哥对美国贸易协定的不满：韩国有更好的协议
summary: As the US and Mexico remain locked in trade talks, Mexican automakers have a complaint with the current agreement: They’re paying some higher tariff rates than competitors in South Korea and Japan.

title: US Launches Strikes Against Iran After Helicopter Shot Down
title_cn: 直升机被击落后美国对伊朗发动打击
summary: The US military launched fresh airstrikes against Iran hours after President Donald Trump vowed to retaliate for the shooting down of a US Army helicopter.

title: Trump Prevails on Spending Package, Averting Bar on Payouts
title_cn: 特朗普在支出计划上获胜，避免了支出障碍
summary: President Donald Trump prevailed after dissident Republican lawmakers abandoned an effort to leverage a $70 billion spending package to prevent him from reviving a payout fund for political allies who say they were unfairly targeted by the Biden administration.
